retrieved_result: The Art of David Lloyd Glover The Art ofDavid Lloyd Glover \"David Lloyd Glover\" Photo by Amyn Nasser Watch Video Documentary \"Visions of Light\" Victoria, British Columbia is the 1949 birthplace of David Lloyd Glover. Located on Vancouver Island, this typically British city with its famous English-style gardens formed the earliest influence on Glover’s art.
Decision_Reason: The page is about the artist David Lloyd Glover and related documentary content, not about easy DIY room decoration ideas.
